description: Course catalog with recommendation and progression metadata used in learning paths

fields.name: description
fields.example: Learn how to debug and monitor backend systems for better performance and stability.

fields.name: job_pathway_role
fields.description: Primary job role this course supports

fields.name: domain_id
fields.description: Reference to domains table for course classification

fields.name: common_course_problem_statement
fields.description: Real-world problem statement framing the course
fields.example: Production backend service begins failing under load and engineers must identify root causes using logs, debugging tools and structured investigation.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether the course is active in catalog

fields.name: version_no
fields.description: Content version number for the course

fields.name: is_published
fields.description: Whether this course version is published for learner runtime

indexes.name: idx_courses_course_code
indexes.description: Fast course lookup by human-readable code

indexes.name: idx_courses_role
indexes.description: Find all courses for a specific job role (Backend Engineer, Data Scientist)

indexes.name: idx_courses_domain_id
indexes.description: Find all courses for a specific domain

indexes.name: idx_courses_difficulty_level
indexes.description: Filter courses by skill tier (beginner, foundation, intermediate, advanced, expert)

indexes.name: idx_courses_role_difficulty
indexes.description: Get beginner courses for specific role

relationships.description: Each course belongs to one domain
A course can cover multiple capabilities from capabilities_master via course_capabilities junction table

courses.title: Debugging & Observability for Backend Systems
courses.description: Learn how to debug and monitor backend systems for better performance and stability.
courses.common_course_problem_statement: Production backend service begins failing under load and engineers must identify root causes using logs, debugging tools and structured investigation.
